results.title: Moody's upgrades ratings of 11 Uzbek insurers following sovereign upgrade
results.description: Moody's Ratings upgraded the financial strength ratings of 11 insurance companies in Uzbekistan following the upgrade of the country's sovereign rating to Ba2.

results.title: Performer calls for President Trump's death at funeral for Iran's late supreme leader
results.description: A performer at the funeral for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has called for the death of U.S. President Donald Trump before a crowd of hundreds of thousands of people Sunday in Iran's capital, Tehran.

results.description: Former Prime Minister Voreqe Bainimarama has formally endorsed and pledged his support for the newly registered political party, One Nation. A One Nation delegation – led by its President, General Secretary, Founding Members, and the Central Executive Committee – met with Bainimarama last Thursday to present the Party’s Constitution and seek his patronage. results.title: Heavy rainfall caused waterlogging, leading to rainwater entering homes in bhubaneswar
results.description: #ଭ ୁବନେଶ୍ବରରେ_ଘରେ_ପଶିଲା_ପାଣି ସାରା ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ବର୍ଷା ବିତ୍ପାତ୍ତ। ୨ ଦିନ ହେଲା ଲାଗି ରହିଛି ବର୍ଷା। ଚାରିଆଡେ ପାଣି। ରାଜଧାନୀ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ବରରେ ୧୦୦ ମିମି ଅତିକ୍ରମ କଲା ବର୍ଷା। ୨୪ ଘଣ୍ଟାରେ ୧୧୨.୩ ମିମି ବର୍ଷା ହୋଇଥିବା ସୂଚନା। ସେପଟେ ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା କାରଣରୁ ଘରେ ପାଣି ପଶିଛି। ରାଜଧାନୀର ହଂସପାଳ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଘରେ ବର୍ଷା ପାଣି ପସିଯାଇଛି। Continuous rainfall over the past two days has caused widespread waterlogging in Bhubaneswar, with the city recording 112.3 mm of rainfall in the last 24 hours. The heavy downpour has led to rainwater entering several houses in the Hanspal area, affecting residents and disrupting normal life. As rain continues across Odisha, the situation in the state capital highlights the growing impact of persistent monsoon showers and urban flooding. #BhubaneswarNews #Hanspal #HeavyRain #OdishaRain #Waterlogging #UrbanFlooding #Monsoon #RainAlert #HanspalFlooding_Bhubaneswar #BhubaneswarHeavyRain #OdishaMonsoonUpdate #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel.
